headline: Aerospace NDT Research and Global Market Forecast Report 2026-2032: Opportunities Driven by Development of AI-Driven NDT Solutions and Expansion of Space and Defense Programs
summary: The global aerospace Nondestructive Testing (NDT) market is projected to grow from USD 3.23 billion in 2026 to USD 5.69 billion by 2032, at a 9.9% CAGR. The avionics & electronics segment will register the highest growth due to increased aircraft electrification and digitalization. Inspection services will dominate, driven by stringent regulatory frameworks and expanding aircraft fleets. North America will lead the market, benefiting from its robust aerospace sector and high-tech innovation. Key
